application_answers.tell_us_about_yourself: I am a hard working and ambitious person looking to help out wherever needed. I bring a variety of skills to the table and can learn quickly if needed. My background in martial arts has given me the discipline and focus to take on any challenge.
application_answers.why_this_role: I am looking for hard, honest work and this role gives me just that chance. I am also eager to grow my skillset and gain real-world experience that complements my engineering coursework.
application_answers.why_this_company: I relate to the company's mission and believe I can contribute meaningfully to the team. I'm drawn to organizations that value hard work and growth.

automation_rules.notes: Keep chat queries to a minimum. Try to answer everything autonomously. When unsure about a question, save it back to the questionnaire for future reference.
